title: Decision to Continue Anti-Dumping Measures on Plywood of Chinese Origin
bodyHtml:
The decision has been made to continue the anti-dumping measure in the importation of "plywood" products originating from the People's Republic of China, following the completion of the final review investigation conducted by the Import General Directorate of the Ministry of Trade.

The anti-dumping measure will continue at a rate of 140 US Dollars/m3 for plywood imported from the People's Republic of China falling under tariff subheadings 4412.10 / 4412.31 / 4412.33 / 4412.34 and 4412.39.

Click here for the Notification on Prevention of Unfair Competition in Imports (No: 2024/10).
